programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?

programme.title: Ghislaine Maxwell: Epstein's Shadow

programme.title: Ghislaine Maxwell: Epstein's Shadow
programme.desc: A look at how after almost 20 years with Jeffrey Epstein, former socialite Ghislaine Maxwell left him to distance herself from his crimes.

programme.title: The Ringleader: The Case of the Bling Ring
programme.desc: Rachel Lee opens up about her role in a crime spree in 2008 and 2009 when she and a gang of suburban teens stole over three million dollars' worth of jewellery, designer clothing and cash from the homes of Paris Hilton, Orlando Bloom, Lindsay Lohan and dozens more celebrities.

programme.title: Undefeated
programme.desc: Documentary following an American football team from an underprivileged Memphis high school. The film tells the story of the local businessman who took over coaching the squad and hopes to turn their fortunes around, as well as three players who must balance training with their education as they strive to achieve college placements.

programme.title: Stasi FC
programme.desc: Tracing a decade of football, this documentary tells the story of the East German secret service's control of BFC Dynamo, a tale of betrayal, murder and manipulation.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Ron Howard, whose films include Splash, Cocoon, Apollo 13, Frost/Nixon, Cinderella Man, Rush, and A Beautiful Mind, for which he won two Oscars.

programme.title: Discovering: Forest Whitaker
programme.desc: The life and career of the American star, who won the Academy Award for Best Actor for his performance as Idi Amin in The Last King of Scotland.

programme.title: Discovering: Sigourney Weaver
programme.desc: The life and career of the American actress, who rose to fame in Ridley Scott's Alien and was nominated for an Acacdemy Award when she reprised her role in Aliens in 1986.

programme.title: Elvis Presley: The Searcher
programme.desc: Conclusion of the documentary about the singer, beginning with his return home after his discharge from the army, and how he dealt with a rapidly changing pop scene.

programme.title: I Am Patrick Swayze
programme.desc: A tribute to the American actor, known for his roles in hits like Dirty Dancing, Ghost and The Outsiders. With contributions by Demi Moore and Rob Lowe among others.

programme.title: Animal Empires

programme.desc: Disabled chimp Chocolate has a new friend and everyone's surprised by just who wants to be her pal. Orangutan babies Kiwi and Sibu try out their restyled playroom and a wooden puzzle for the woollies provides a great work out.
